name: The Terra Cotta Vessel

description: Soft-textured white stoneware set with subtle ribbing and minimal Nordic-inspired form.

finish: Charred Matte with Gold Kintsugi Lacquer

description: Wood-fired traditional Japanese jar with natural ash deposits and deep kiln markings.

description: Rustic farmhouse stoneware crock with natural speckling and durable utilitarian form.

description: Wide serving platter with organic ash glaze patterns formed during high-temperature firing.

description: Lightweight striped Turkish linen throw, breathable and naturally textured for everyday comfort.
